title: Tinker's Useful Items
description: An addon for tconstruct.There is no java code, only json.THIS MOD NEED JSON THINGS
body:
# What's This Mod?
An addon for Tinker's Construct 3 that adds several unique tools and practical items!

# 🔨 Tools
## Chisel
An easy-to-craft pickaxe-like tool with fast mining speed but extremely low durability and cannot be repaired.

## Torch
A tool for lighting up your surroundings.

## Rod
A tool that extends your reach distance.

## Backpack
A "chestplate"-style gear that can store plenty of items.

## Litboard
An ancient tool from minecart chest — a combination of a shield and a torch — that grants Fire Resistance.

# 📦 Miscellaneous
## Dropper
A copper can with a fluid capacity of 10mB (1 nugget).

## Seared Copper Can
A copper can with a fluid capacity of 250mB (1 ingot).

---
That's all for now, but stay tuned — this mod is constantly being updated!

Note: Starting from version 1.1.0, this mod has built-in unreleased [JsonMore](https://github.com/Qikahome/JsonMore). Please feedback in time if there is a mixin-related crash.
